title: Armor Handler Field Analysis
description: Analysis of armor-related effect handlers in Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects namespace

constructor.name: ReduceArmorHandler_Constructor
constructor.description: Initializes handler with effect data reference and default stack count

onUpdate.name: ReduceArmorHandler_OnUpdate_ApplyArmorReduction
onUpdate.description: Applies armor reduction debuff to target entity

create.description: Factory method to create handler from effect data

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x18.description: Reference to the ReduceArmor effect data

0x58.name: PerStackReduction
0x58.description: Amount of armor reduction per stack

0x5c.description: Maximum total armor reduction regardless of stacks

onAdded.description: Damages armor durability when effect is applied to entity

create.name: Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.DamageArmorDurability$$Create
create.description: Factory method to create handler from effect data

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the DamageArmorDurability effect data

0x58.name: FlatDamage
0x58.description: Flat amount of durability damage to apply

0x5c.name: PerArmorTierDamage
0x5c.description: Multiplier applied to current durability (percentage-based damage)

0x60.name: ArmorTier
0x60.description: Armor tier reference used for per-tier calculations

onBeforeDamageReceived.name: Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.IgnoreDamageEffectHandler$$OnBeforeDamageReceived
onBeforeDamageReceived.description: Intercepts incoming damage and potentially reduces/ignores it

create.name: Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.IgnoreDamage$$Create
create.description: Factory method to create handler from effect data

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the IgnoreDamage effect data

0x58.name: ChancePercent
0x58.description: Percentage chance (0-100) for the effect to trigger

0x5c.name: ReductionPercent
0x5c.description: Percentage of damage to reduce when triggered

0x60.name: RequiredTags
0x60.description: Tags that incoming skill must have for this effect to apply

0x38.name: ArmorDamage
0x38.description: Armor durability damage amount being dealt

behavior: 1. Check if incoming skill tags contain all required tags at effect+0x60
2. Roll pseudo-random chance using ChancePercent at effect+0x58
3. If successful, calculate reduction factor = ReductionPercent / 100.0
4. Reduce damage at context+0x2c by (damage * reductionFactor)
5. Reduce armor damage at context+0x38 by (armorDamage * reductionFactor)
6. Consume one use from the skill

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the effect data (derived type varies by handler)

GetEntity.description: Returns Entity using the skill via Skill->GetEntity()

GetActor.description: Returns Actor associated with the skill
